steps.title: Set up the right triangle from apex to base
steps.content: Point A is the apex, and B lies on the base circumference. The height from A perpendicular to the base is 42 cm. The horizontal distance from the base center to B is the radius $r$. Together with AB = 84 cm, these form a right triangle with the height and radius as legs, and AB as the hypotenuse.

steps.title: Apply Pythagorean theorem to find r²
steps.content:
In the right triangle:
$$42^2 + r^2 = 84^2$$
$$1764 + r^2 = 7056$$
$$r^2 = 5292$$
Keep $r^2$ in this form—no need to simplify to a radical.
